title: MikroTik MTP250-53V47-OD, Outdoor AC/DC power supply, 53V, 250W
description: Outdoor AC/DC power supply in a durable metal chassis with output voltage 53 V , max. output current 4.7 A, total power 250 W suitable for a series of netPower products from MikroTik. The chassis is IP67 certified with extra protection against dust and moisture. The power supply is terminated by two stripped cables without connectors - input 3-core AC cable 230 V AC (100 - 240 V AC) and output DC cable
specsSearch: Power Power [W] 250 Output Voltage [V] 53 Output Current [A] 4,7
